tasks.title: Deterministic analysis complete
tasks.description: Deterministic snapshot is available for orchestration workflow routing.
tasks.reason: Orchestration received deterministic governance and classification output.

tasks.title: Governance review task
tasks.description: Confirm deterministic governance state and ensure escalation decision is traceable.
tasks.reason: Governance review completed with no additional escalation requirement.

tasks.title: Evidence review tasks
tasks.description: Review deterministic evidence gap list and request required missing support.
tasks.reason: No critical evidence gaps reported in deterministic output.

tasks.title: Manual review routing
tasks.description: Route escalated deterministic cases to manual reviewer challenge workflow.

tasks.title: Capital protection stop review
tasks.description: Record deterministic stop state for blocked or no-deal outcomes.
tasks.reason: No capital protection stop triggered by deterministic output.

tasks.title: Accepted limitations awareness
tasks.description: Surface accepted operational limitations without changing deterministic deal decisions.
tasks.reason: Accepted limitations acknowledged; awareness task created for review discipline.
